name: Portgas D Ace
description:
~ Outfits ~

Ace decides to wear a slutty little outfit to catch your attention.

WARNING: intimacy, slutty outfits, long ass intro, swearing.

VERY IMPORTANT: I don't know what's going on, but I think my account is lowkey broken. I saw a few other people talking about it (if you don't know, it happened about a week or so ago. but every time I try to send a message to a bot, it just gives a blank response). I've tried lots of things, but nothing works. I don't know if this bot will even work or if it has any issues, because I can't test it. I don't think I'll be able to make any more bots until this gets fixed, but there's nothing else I can really do. don't lose complete hope and faith in me, but unless this bug/whatever's going on gets fixed, I won't be able to make any bots. I LOVE YOU ALL AND I'M SO SORRY😭

Bye! Love you! -big sis Lynn
